src/ashare_evidence/api.py.reason: FastAPI application with dashboard, simulation, settings, manual-research, watchlist, stock, event-analysis, improvement-suggestion, shortpick lab, shortpick replay, and market-factor study routes. The shortpick market-factor endpoint attaches frozen paper-strategy evidence from the long-sample artifact while preserving cached read-only behavior, and the paper-tracking ledger endpoint projects frozen strategy status, LLM paper-control signals, same-pool market-factor controls, execution-timing controls, intraday same-day entry controls, and four exit-track monitoring rules from existing shortpick runs/candidates without triggering market refresh or model work; router extraction remains possible but would add broad touch points across the current schema surface. 2026-05-14 review: growth moves historical replay feedback, model feedback, market-factor study display, operations summary, home shell, and simulation workspace detail onto materialized frontend projections, adds a read-only coarse trend-regime projection so the history UI does not overstate tiny fine-bucket samples, and attaches the offline trade-level regime supplement artifact without adding request-time computation. 2026-05-14 late review: projection now prefers full trade-level attribution for stock/industry/date/regime contribution summaries while keeping request-time reads cached. 2026-05-21 review: workbench projection route was extracted to api_workbench_projection.py; api.py only registers the router, keeping future workbench endpoints out of the main app file.

Historical replay now includes a reduced non-expert default readout, aggregate statistical readouts, per-run drilldown, readable replay family labels, explicit loading states for slow replay feedback tables, and the frozen paper strategy summary with market-factor controls, multi-index references, cost stress, and paper-tracking status. Heavy replay aggregate/per-run feedback and strategy closeout data now load in the background instead of blocking initial lab or replay navigation. Live runs now surface the frozen paper strategy separately from LLM and market-factor control groups; the paper-tracking tab explains the four trading-day exit tracks, the strict daily LLM paper-control stock selected from the LLM recommendation pool, and same-pool market controls including offensive Top1, cooldown Top1, deterministic random baseline, next-open entry timing, and intraday same-day entry timing. 2026-05-14 review: growth is limited to readable historical replay labels and sample guardrails: entry/regime/period keys are displayed in Chinese, object market-regime tags are parsed into trend/volatility/size labels, unidentified regime rows are hidden from the default conclusion table, execution assumptions and detailed statistical tables are collapsed by default, supplemented trade-level regime rows are preferred when the offline artifact exists, and model-feedback now separates rolled-up topic performance from stock industry performance. 2026-05-14 late review: collapsed attribution details now show full trade-level stock and industry contribution tables when the offline artifact is ready. 2026-05-16 review: paper tracking ledger gained local search plus group, entry-state, and entry-rule filters shared by desktop table and mobile list.
